title: Overview: Application for a Trust Account Number - Canada.ca
content:
Application for a Trust Account Number
You need a trust account number to file a T3 return.
To obtain your trust account number instantly, use the Trust Account Registration online service. Otherwise, you may fill out a form T3APP, Application for a Trust Account Number .
You will need to provide a signed copy of the trust document or the last will and testament . You also need to know your Trust type .

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
